case_title: MAYRA VALDIVIA VS. HALLEY HINES PEARSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MAYRA VALDIVIA RE: AMENDING PRAYER AMOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDIVIA, MAYRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VALDIVIA, MAYRA AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, HALLEY HINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-08-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAYRA VALDIVIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HALLEY HINES PEARSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED JUL-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, HALLEY HINES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTFF MAYRA VALDIVIA & HALLEY HINES PERSON. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PARTIES REACHED AND AGREEMENT AFTER A MEDIATION SESSION WITH JESSICA STRASEN OF USF LAW SCHOOL. DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. IF NEITER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR ANOTHER THREE MONTHS, AND EVERY THREE MONTHS THEREAFTER, UNTIL THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-12-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MAYRA VALDIVIA OR DEFENDANT HALLEY HINES PEARSON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 6/12/18, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE UNLESS A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IS ALREADY ON RECORD DUE TO NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES AND NO INDICATION BY PLAINTIFF AS TO AN END DATE FOR THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VALDIVIA, MAYRA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY VALDIVIA, MAYRA PEARSON, HALLEY HINES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-08-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAYRA VALDIVIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HALLEY HINES PEARSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER 3-9-18 ORDER. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,359.00 FILED BY VALDIVIA, MAYRA AS TO DEFENDANT PEARSON, HALLEY HINES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MAYRA VALDIVIA OR DEFENDANT HALLEY HINES PEARSON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 12/08/17, CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR ANOTHER THREE MONTHS UNTIL THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-08-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER FOR MS. VALDIVIA & MS. PEARSON TO PARTICIPATE IN MEDIATION. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MAYRA VALDIVIA & DEFENDANT HALLEY HINES PEARSON. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 8/17/16. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-09-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING, CONTINUE ANOTHER 3 MONTHS UNTIL BALANCE PAID IN FULL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO MARCH 9, 2017 AT 8:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JPT JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 03/09/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE:FILE DESTROYED PER AUGUST 19,2021 ORDER
